page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmc8i.48xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by Intel Xeon 8475B processors. Operating at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz, this instance features 192 dedicated physical cores and 192 vCPUs, utilizing a single thread per core configuration. The system is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 2.67 GB per core.

This server does not include local storage, requiring external block storage solutions for data persistence. It also lacks integrated GPU hardware accelerators. For connectivity, the instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 100 Gbps. The KVM hypervisor manages the virtualization layer, ensuring dedicated resource allocation without hyperthreading overhead.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the high density of dedicated physical cores offers predictable execution times for compute-heavy tasks, though the lower memory-to-vCPU ratio may limit memory-bound applications. The server is designed for workloads such as high-performance computing, intensive batch processing, compute-heavy simulations, and large-scale web serving architectures that require high network throughput and dedicated CPU resources.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmc8i.48xlarge is an x86_64 compute-focused server featuring 192 dedicated physical cores and 192 vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 8475B processors running at 2.7 GHz. With a single-thread-per-core design, it provides dedicated CPU allocation and 512.0 GB of system memory, resulting in 2.67 GB of RAM per core. The instance operates on a KVM hypervisor and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 100 Gbps. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, presenting a tradeoff that requires external storage attachments. This hardware profile is designed for parallel processing, high-performance computing, and network-heavy workloads that benefit from dedicated physical cores without hyperthreading overhead.
